architectural_notes: Header component should render only once at the top; title "Campus Cafeteria" with smaller light-gray subtitle "JSPM Canteen" below, and Login button right-aligned.
known_issues: Duplicate "Campus Cafeteria" header is appearing; should be removed so only one header is rendered.

existing_features.title: Ensure the app renders exactly one top header across the user flow by removing the duplicate Header rendering so only a single sticky header appears at the top (the header must not be duplicated on the Home page).

Update the Header title block so that directly below the main title "Campus Cafeteria" there is a smaller subtitle line with the exact text "JSPM Canteen" styled in light gray, with clean vertical spacing between title and subtitle; the subtitle must be visually smaller than the main title.

Keep the authentication button (Login/Logout) aligned to the right within the single header, and ensure existing cart/login interactions still work after removing the duplicate header (including proceeding to payment from the cart drawer).

new_feature_requests.summary: Update header to a single top header: remove duplicate "Campus Cafeteria", add light-gray smaller subtitle "JSPM Canteen" with clean spacing, keep Login button right-aligned

projectName: Deduplicate top header and add subtitle under Campus Cafeteria
